description: DLP solutions detect and prevent unauthorized data exfiltration across network, endpoint, cloud, and email channels using content inspection, contextual analysis, and policy enforcement.

layers: Cloud DLP (CASB, API connectors for SaaS/IaaS)
architecture.diagram:
Internet <-> [Network DLP Sensor] <-> [Firewall] <-> Internal Network
                                                        |
                                                  [Email Gateway + DLP]
                                                        |
Endpoints [Endpoint DLP Agent] <-> [Internal Network] <-> [CASB/Cloud DLP]
                                                        |
                                              [Central DLP Console]
                                        (Policies | Alerts | Reports)

deploymentPatterns.description: DLP sensor inline with traffic flow, actively blocking policy violations. Higher protection but risk of false-positive blocking.
deploymentPatterns.useCase: External email and web traffic for high-sensitivity organizations

deploymentPatterns.description: DLP sensor monitors copies of traffic without blocking. Used for initial deployment and tuning.
deploymentPatterns.useCase: Initial DLP rollout, policy development, and baseline assessment

deploymentPatterns.description: DLP connects to cloud services via API for at-rest scanning and near-real-time monitoring.
deploymentPatterns.useCase: SaaS application monitoring (O365, Google Workspace, Slack)

deploymentPatterns.description: Software agent on endpoints monitoring local file operations, USB, clipboard, and print.
deploymentPatterns.useCase: Insider threat prevention, removable media control

vendorLandscape.strengths: Native M365 integration, unified labeling, endpoint + cloud + email
Mature network/endpoint/cloud DLP, advanced content inspection
Risk-adaptive protection, strong endpoint DLP, UEBA integration
Data-centric security, strong endpoint focus, kernel-level monitoring
Leading CASB/cloud DLP, inline and API modes, real-time cloud inspection
Cloud-delivered DLP, integrated with ZTNA, inline inspection

evaluationCriteria: False positive management and tuning capabilities
Integration with classification and labeling solutions

malaysianContext.bnmRmit: BNM RMiT S10.55 requires data leakage prevention controls for financial institutions. DLP must cover both internal and external data transfers.
